did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper describes a dataset of optical spectra and clinical features acquired on human skin for potential use by researchers in artificial intelligence to develop diagnostic methods. However, the study itself did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results; it focused on data acquisition using the SpectroLive device and providing clinical diagnostics via anatomopathology.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
